data.title: Update implementation-plan SKILL.md Context File Check for researchFindings backward compatibility
data.description:
## Story
eaa2-ca1c — PREPLANNING_CONTEXT research compounding across pipeline

## Goal
Update the Context File Check section of implementation-plan SKILL.md to gracefully handle PREPLANNING_CONTEXT payloads with or without the researchFindings field (backward compatibility with pre-schema-v2 contexts).

## Implementation
In the Context File Check section:
- After parsing the PREPLANNING_CONTEXT payload, add: "If `researchFindings` field is absent (schema_version < 2 or legacy context), treat as empty array — existing behavior is unaffected"
- Add schema_version awareness: "Check `schema_version` field; if absent or < 2, apply v1 compatibility mode (ignore researchFindings)"
- Document fail-open: "Parsing failures in researchFindings must not block context loading — treat as empty array and log a warning"

## Acceptance Criteria
1. test_impl_plan_context_check_handles_missing_research_findings passes
2. test_impl_plan_context_check_fail_open passes
3. test_impl_plan_context_check_schema_version_aware passes
4. All tests in tests/skills/test-implementation-plan-research-findings-compat.sh GREEN
5. Existing Context File Check behavior unaffected when researchFindings absent (backward compat)

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md (UPDATE — Context File Check section backward compat additions)

## Dependencies
Depends on 74f6-192b (RED test must exist before implementation)
Depends on 4d18-2454 (preplanning must define schema first)
